h2: Politics Inside Out: Rosie Duffield MP
h2: Rosie hosts a Meningitis Drop-In in Parliament
text_excerpt: --> NEWS | Rosie Duffield MP top of page Rosie Duffield MP for Canterbury, Whitstable and the Villages HOME ABOUT ROSIE PRIORITIES Defending our Green Spaces A Brighter Future for Our Young Building a Fairer Economy Protecting our Waterways Strengthening our NHS A Stronger Relationship with Europe CONSTITUENCY NEWS SEND Survey - April 2026 Birth Trauma Inquiry CONTACT More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Latest News In Parliament In Canterbury Press Newsletter Latest News Latest SEND Survey Responses For too long, the SEND system has let down many children and young people. Rosie is committed to speaking up for those who may feel unheard as changes are made. Thank you for taking the time to complete my SEND survey. Here is an overview of the responses I have received so far… The feedback from the survey is clear. Most respondents believe the government’s plans do not adequately address the significant challenges within SEN education. They feel that the measures outlined i Apr 22 1 min read Rosie Duffield - Easter Newsletter Read Rosie's latest Roundup below: Apr 14 1 min read Politics Inside Out: Rosie Duffield MP Rosie Duffield MP speaks to former MPs Gloria De Piero and Tracey Crouch on the Politics Inside Out Podcast. Rosie discusses her resignation from the Labour Party, life as an independent MP, her friendship with JK Rowling and the impact of the meningitis outbreak on her constituency. Mar 28 1 min read Rosie hosts a Meningitis Drop-In in Parliament Rosie (centre) pictured with the teams from Meningitis Research Foundation (left) and Meningitis Now UK (right) On Tuesday 24th March, Rosie Duffield MP hosted a drop-in for MPs and Peers in Parliament with Meningitis Research Foundation and Meningitis Now UK. The outbreak in Canterbury has shown the urgent need for Meningitis B (MenB) vaccination for sixth formers and students and the importance of raising awareness of the symptoms of meningitis.
